# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
This project does not provide release-specific security updates yet.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
If you discover a security issue, please report it to the project team and do not publish details publicly.

## Secure Development Notes
- Do not commit secrets, keys, or credentials into the repository.
- Keep test inputs under tests/ and avoid embedding private data.
- Review .gitignore before committing to ensure artifacts and secrets are excluded.
